basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Accountant, Cashier and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Accountant, Cashier and Accounts Clerk Notification 2026 has been released on 11 July 2026 on the official website bfuhs.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the BFUHS Accountant, Cashier and Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC candidates 5 years; Punjab Govt. and its Boards/Corporations/Commissions and Authorities employees, and all States/Central Govt. employees up to 45 years; widow, divorcees and certain other categories of married women up to 40 years.

qualification.details: Accountant: M.Com with 1st Division from a recognized University or Institution with at least five years of experience in Public Sector Undertaking or a limited company. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge of Computer Operations, Data Entry, and retrieval of information. Cashier: Bachelor's degree from a recognized University or Institution. Possesses at least one hundred and twenty hours course with hands-on experience in the use of Personal Computer or Information Technology in Office Productivity applications or Desktop Publishing Applications from a Government recognized Institution or a reputed Institution which is ISO 9001 certified OR Possesses a Computer Information Technology Course equivalent to 'O' level certificate of Department of Electronics Accreditation of Computer Course (DOBACC) of Government of India. Shall have to qualify a test both in Punjabi & English typewriting at the speed of thirty words per minute. Should pass Punjabi up to Matric standard. Accounts Clerk: B.Com from a UGC recognized University and working knowledge of Computers. Knowledge of Tally Accounting Software with more than 02 (two) years of practical experience, especially in the field of Accounting and Auditing in a State run University/Higher or Professional Government Educational Institution of Central/State Government.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BFUHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BFUHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Accountant: M.Com with 1st Division from a recognized University or Institution with at least five years of experience in Public Sector Undertaking or a limited company. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge of Computer Operations, Data Entry, and retrieval of information. Cashier: Bachelor's degree from a recognized University or Institution. Possesses at least one hundred and twenty hours course with hands-on experience in the use of Personal Computer or Information Technology in Office Productivity applications or Desktop Publishing Applications from a Government recognized Institution or a reputed Institution which is ISO 9001 certified OR Possesses a Computer Information Technology Course equivalent to 'O' level certificate of Department of Electronics Accreditation of Computer Course (DOBACC) of Government of India. Shall have to qualify a test both in Punjabi & English typewriting at the speed of thirty words per minute. Should pass Punjabi up to Matric standard. Accounts Clerk: B.Com from a UGC recognized University and working knowledge of Computers. Knowledge of Tally Accounting Software with more than 02 (two) years of practical experience, especially in the field of Accounting and Auditing in a State run University/Higher or Professional Government Educational Institution of Central/State Government.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC candidates 5 years; Punjab Govt. and its Boards/Corporations/Commissions and Authorities employees, and all States/Central Govt. employees up to 45 years; widow, divorcees and certain other categories of married women up to 40 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BFUHS recruitment is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Accountant post. However, the total number of vacancies across all mentioned posts is 4.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the BFUHS posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for all the posts mentioned in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: For the Accountant post, candidates must have an M.Com with a 1st Division and at least five years of experience. Knowledge of computer operations is also preferred.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The Accountant position is offered with a salary as per Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35400/-) as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates is 2360. Please check the notification for details on payment methods.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these BFUHS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test followed by the creation of a Merit List based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the state as Punjab. While it doesn't explicitly restrict applications from other states, it's advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official PDF for any state-specific requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BFUHS recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
